---
title: "Sophia Leeke"
---

## Sophia Leeke

**Dates:** 1761/2-1847

**Maiden name:** (Bargus)

### Description

great-aunt of CMY

### Biography

The <i>European Magazine</i> 14  (1788) 231 recorded the marriage of Samuel Leake, esq., of the Isle of Wight, to Sophia Bargus, youngest daughter of Richard Bargus esq. of Fareham. She appears to have been a half-sister of the Rev. Thomas Bargus.  The <i>Gentleman’s Magazine</i> 182 (1847) 563 records her death at Cheltenham aged 85, spelling it Leeke, and stating that she was the mother of Captain Sir Henry Leeke, R.N. (1794-1870, <i>ODNB,/i>).  Lady Tucker, to whom CMY refers, would thus be her daughter and FMY’s first cousin.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
